articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Former Pinterest team redesigns email with Extra — and it’s actually good - TechCrunch
articles.description: Extra, from a team of former Pinterest designers and engineers, reimagines email around your life instead of the traditional inbox.
articles.content: When was the last time you were actually excited about email? If you’re older, probably back in 2004, when Gmail was rolling out its first beta invites. If you’re younger, probably never. Over the ye… [+9265 chars]
